title: Play a targeted card on an opponent
description: A player can select a card, choose a target opponent when required, and confirm the move to resolve the action on the game board.

steps.description: Navigate to /auth
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Click the join control for an available room
Select a card from the hand
Select an opponent target
Confirm the selected choice
Verify the card action resolves on the game board

title: Access the dashboard after signing in
description: A returning user can log in and reach the authenticated dashboard.

steps.description: Navigate to /auth
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Verify the authenticated dashboard is displayed

title: Join an available room from the dashboard
description: An authenticated player can join an existing room from the lobby and enter the active game room.

steps.description: Navigate to /auth
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Click the join control for an available room
Verify the active multiplayer game board is displayed

title: Create a room from the dashboard
description: An authenticated player can create a room and see it added to the lobby.

steps.description: Navigate to /auth
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Click the create room control
Verify a newly created room appears in the lobby

title: Play a card that does not require a target
description: A player can select a self-contained card and confirm the move without choosing an opponent target.

steps.description: Navigate to /auth
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Click the join control for an available room
Select a card from the hand
Confirm the selected choice
Verify the selected card resolves on the board

title: Watch turn updates and wealth changes during a match
description: A player can observe the live game log while turns advance and wealth totals update during the match.

steps.description: Navigate to /auth
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Click the join control for an available room
Verify game log updates are displayed
Verify wealth updates are displayed

title: See available rooms in the lobby
description: An authenticated player can view the list of available rooms on the dashboard.

steps.description: Navigate to /auth
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Verify available rooms are displayed

title: Render the game board on smaller screens
description: An authenticated player can view and use the multiplayer game board in a mobile-sized layout without losing the match state.

steps.description: Navigate to /auth
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Click the join control for an available room
Verify the mobile game board is displayed
Verify the current match state is displayed

title: Render the game board on desktop screens
description: An authenticated player can view and use the multiplayer game board in a desktop layout without losing the match state.

steps.description: Navigate to /auth
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Click the join control for an available room
Verify the desktop game board is displayed
Verify the current match state is displayed

title: Show validation errors for invalid credentials
description: A visitor entering invalid credentials sees a clear authentication error and remains unable to access the dashboard.

steps.description: Navigate to /auth
Fill in the email field with invalid@example.com
Fill in the password field with an invalid password
Submit the login form
Verify an authentication error is visible
Verify the authenticated dashboard is not displayed

title: Switch between login and sign-up modes
description: A visitor can switch between login and sign-up views on the authentication page.

steps.description: Navigate to /auth
Switch to sign-up mode
Switch to login mode
Verify the login form is displayed
Verify the sign-up form is not displayed
